data.title: Data center management software market to hit $3.7 billion by 2030, grew from $2.2 billion in 2024, at a CAGR of 9.2%.
data.description: A report on the global Data Center Infrastructure Management Software market has been released, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. In 2024, the market was valued at US$2.2 billion, with projections showing it could reach US$3.7 billion by 2030. This represents a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 9.2% from 2024 to 2030. The report offers insights into market trends, drivers, and forecasts to aid informed decision-making.

data.title: US stocks mixed; American Express reports upbeat Q2 results. Nasdaq up 50+ points. Dow down 0.11% to 44,435.25, Nasdaq up 0.37% to 20,962.60, S&P 500 up 0.17% to 6,308.01. American Express Q2 revenue grows 9% YoY to $17.86 billion, beats estimates. Adjusted EPS $4.08, beats consensus $3.87.
data.description: U.S. stocks saw gains midway through trading, especially in the tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite which rose by over 50 points on Friday. The Dow traded slightly down at 44,435.25, while the NASDAQ went up by 0.37% to 20,962.60, and the S&P 500 also rose by 0.17% to 6,308.01. Utilities shares jumped by 0.9%, but communication services stocks dipped by 0.3%. American Express Co. reported strong fiscal second-quarter 2025 results, with 9% revenue growth year-over-year to $17.86 billion, surpassing analyst estimates. The adjusted EPS of $4.08 also exceeded projections of $3.87. Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc. was among the equities trading up. (Character count: 601)

data.title: $9.6B Bitcoin transfer by whale, GENIUS Act audits raise correction worries in industry.
data.description: A prominent Bitcoin investor recently moved $9.6 billion in assets, causing speculation about a market correction. The GENIUS Act has introduced new regulations mandating audits for stablecoins, raising concerns within the industry.

data.title: Watsco (NYSE: WSO) to hold Q2 earnings call on July 30, 2025 at 10:00 a.m. (EDT). Senior management will share results.
data.description: Miami-based company Watsco, Inc. (NYSE: WSO) revealed plans to conduct its Q2 2025 conference call on July 30, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. (EDT). The call will include prepared remarks on the quarterly results, as well as a Q&A session with the senior management team.

data.title: B. Braun introduces 7 new heparin sodium injection products, including 25,000 Units in 0.45% solution.
data.description: In Bethlehem, Pennsylvania on July 18, 2025, B. Braun Medical Inc. introduced its latest product, Heparin Sodium Injections, to the American market. This new addition to their portfolio contains 25,000 Units of Heparin in 0.45% solution and further solidifies their position as a top provider in smart infusion therapy and pain management.
